name: clean IaC and clean app code both pass the pre-write governor (both paths, no false deny)
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"ok.tf","content":"resource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"b\" {}\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1; tf=$?; printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"ok.ts","content":"export const z = 1;\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1; ts=$?; [ "$tf" -eq 0 ] && [ "$ts" -eq 0 ] && echo both-clean-pass 1>&2
